query: My RAG over 800 product-spec PDFs retrieves the entire PDF for each query and stuffs it into the LLM context window. The model has a 200k context so this fits. Please audit my chunking strategy.
expected_behavior: Identifies that the pipeline has no chunking step to audit because the document is the retrieval unit, and declines to walk a chunk-size sweep that would not apply

Suggests the audits that actually apply to a full-document-retrieval pipeline (prompt token budget, inference latency budget, or when to introduce chunking once the corpus crosses the context window) rather than forcing a chunking audit
Does not produce a chunk_size × overlap sweep table or recommend specific chunk_size and overlap numeric values for this whole-doc-retrieval pipeline
